creator: billf@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Updated in rev1.4 of the Makefile, and imported the new files. 

Just something to remember, please say somewhere in the PR 'I added patches/patch-fm and files/http_protocol.patch' so the committer remembers to cvs add the file. This wasn't a problem this time, but it makes good sense. 

Thanks!
